lyricsVariations.title: Still We Sail
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
We left the shore in rain
With salt in our sleeves
Names folded in our coats
And ash in our teeth

The map was torn by time
The wind kept changing sides
Still every night we pointed
Toward the other line

[Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Through the dark, through the hail
Not for pride, not for glory
Just the cost of staying still

Still we sail, still we sail
Past the grief we cannot jail
If we stop here, we lose more
So we pull against the waves

[Verse 2]
I saw your face in ports
In lanterns and in glass
In strangers sharing bread
That never asked my past

The land behind us burned
The land ahead was blurred
But your hand on the rope
Was the truest thing I learned

[Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Through the dark, through the hail
Not for pride, not for glory
Just the cost of staying still

Still we sail, still we sail
Past the grief we cannot jail
If we stop here, we lose more
So we pull against the waves

[Bridge]
Maybe courage is a word
For people on the shore
Maybe we just learned
To bleed and move once more

The cold can name us all
The sea can take its toll
But I won't trade the ache
For a locked and waiting soul

[Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Through the dark, through the hail
Not for pride, not for glory
Just the cost of staying still

Still we sail, still we sail
Past the grief we cannot jail
If we stop here, we lose more
So we pull against the waves

lyricsVariations.title: Still We Sail
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I left my name in ash
On a door that would not stay
Your coat still smells like rain
On the peg by the window frame

The maps all changed on me
The road got thin and cold
But I tied my hands to the wheel
And I watched the dark unfold

[Pre-Chorus]
Not brave
Just moved
By the shape of the bruise
If I stop here now
I lose more than I lose

[Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Past the wreck and the hail
Still we sail, still we sail
What we fear feels less than stay

Still we sail, still we sail
With the ache and the trail
Still we sail, still we sail
Stopping now would cost us more

[Verse 2]
I kissed the edge of exile
With salt on my tongue
The harbor ghosted out
And the gulls kept circling up

I held your silence close
Like a stone in my coat
Some nights it pulled me under
Some nights it kept me afloat

[Pre-Chorus]
Not brave
Just moved
By the shape of the bruise
If I turn back now
I lose more than I lose

[Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Past the wreck and the hail
Still we sail, still we sail
What we fear feels less than stay

Still we sail, still we sail
With the ache and the trail
Still we sail, still we sail
Stopping now would cost us more

[Bridge]
And if the sea takes names
Let it take the old ones too
I have learned what hunger means
I have learned what loss can do

So I lean into the black
Let the broken stars be proof
We are not made of courage
We are made of moving through

[Final Chorus]
Still we sail, still we sail
Past the wreck and the hail
Still we sail, still we sail
What we fear feels less than stay

Still we sail, still we sail
With the ache and the trail
Still we sail, still we sail
Stopping now would cost us more

lyricsVariations.title: Scar Country
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I wake up here again
in this borrowed skin
My ribs know the route
my mouth learned to live with

A name in the pocket
worn thin at the fold
I touch every scar line
like map ink in gold

[Pre-Chorus]
Every border I crossed
is still under my hands
Every door I survived
left a mark where I stand

[Chorus]
My body, my country
my body, my country
I carry the lost home
like a bone in my sleeve

My body, my country
my body, my country
If exile comes looking
it finds me here, still breathing

[Verse 2]
The old rooms are vanished
the keys gone cold
But my heart keeps a census
of every street I sold

I sleep with the ruins
behind my eyes
And wake with the language
that keeps me alive

[Pre-Chorus]
Every border I crossed
is still under my hands
Every door I survived
left a mark where I stand

[Chorus]
My body, my country
my body, my country
I carry the lost home
like a bone in my sleeve

My body, my country
my body, my country
If exile comes looking
it finds me here, still breathing

[Bridge]
And if there’s no return
then let this be true
I was made from the leaving
but I stayed with you

No flag in the window
no soil I can claim
Just this scarred little kingdom
that answers my name

[Chorus]
My body, my country
my body, my country
I carry the lost home
like a bone in my sleeve

My body, my country
my body, my country
If exile comes looking
it finds me here, still breathing

lyricsVariations.title: Exile Body
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Dust on the window pane
Just like the dust on my memory
Of a place I can't reclaim
A life that ain't meant for me

[Chorus]
This exile body, my only country now
Every scar a border, a silent vow
To a homeland lost, a forgotten sound
In this flesh and bone, I'm forever bound

[Verse 2]
The ache in my bones, a map of old roads
Each tremor a whisper of burdens I've towed
My breath, a thin thread, in the wind it still weaves
Through phantom fields of long-fallen leaves

[Chorus]

lyricsVariations.title: Accordion Soul
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
That old squeeze box
Got a story
Every push pull
A memory

[Chorus]
Accordion breathes
Yeah it breathes
Like a ghost in the room
It never leaves

[Verse 2]
Dusty keys sigh
A forgotten tune
Whispers of places
Beneath the moon

[Chorus]
Accordion breathes
Yeah it breathes
Like a ghost in the room
It never leaves

[Bridge]
They say it's just wood and air
But I hear a soul in there
A long lost song
A silent prayer

[Chorus]
Accordion breathes
Yeah it breathes

lyricsVariations.title: Bread of Dust
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
You sat by the window frame
with your case on your knees
Old paint on your fingertips
and salt in your sleeve

You learned every room you left
by the shape of its door
Now the silence comes back
like you walking through it once more

[Pre-Chorus]
And I can hear you in the fold
in the creak, in the seam
Something old keeps wanting
to become the air in me

[Chorus]
The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
It carries you home
through the dust and the reeds

The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
Like a hand on my chest
like a name I still keep

[Verse 2]
It knows the train platform rain
the soap on the floor
The blue bowl by the sink
and your boots by the door

It remembers the feast
and the empty after
The way your laugh could bloom
then vanish in the rafters

[Pre-Chorus]
And I lean in close
when the bellows rise
Like the world is opening
with your eyes

[Chorus]
The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
It carries you home
through the dust and the reeds

The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
Like a hand on my chest
like a name I still keep

[Bridge]
Let it pull the air
from the rooms we knew
Let it bend that ache
into something true

If you are the gone
then stay in the song
In the push and the pull
where I still belong

[Final Chorus]
The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
It carries you home
through the dust and the reeds

The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
Like a hand on my chest
like a name I still keep

The accordion breathes
The accordion breathes
And I hear you now
in the space between me

lyricsVariations.title: Never Mailed You
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I folded your name
In a blue lined sheet
Wrote "come back soon"
Then hid the creed

Left it in my drawer
By the tax receipts
Next to broken pens
And your extra key

[Pre-Chorus]
I had the words
Right on my tongue
Held them too long
Till the day was done

[Chorus]
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Love with no address
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Now it lives in my chest
(Sent it in my head)
(Too late, too late)

[Verse 2]
I wrote "I was scared"
At the bottom there
"I loved you hard"
But I never dared

Each stamp I bought
Stayed in the book
I kept your ghost
In a careful look

[Pre-Chorus]
I saw your porch
I saw your car
I turned around
With a pounding heart

[Chorus]
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Love with no address
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Now it lives in my chest
(Sent it in my head)
(Too late, too late)

[Bridge]
If you found the box
Would you know my hand?
Would you read my fear
And still understand?

I let the truth
Grow dust and rust
A love came whole
Then missed us

[Final Chorus]
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Love with no address
Never mailed you
Never mailed you
Now it lives in my chest
(Sent it in my head)
(Too late, too late)

Never mailed you
Never mailed you
And I still can't forget
(Still can't forget)
(Still can't forget)

lyricsVariations.title: Letters Never Crossed
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I wrote your name
On the back of June
Folded up the truth
In a blue-lined room
Stamped my heart
With a trembling hand
Then I let it sit
Where the silence lands

[Pre-Chorus]
I said it plain
Then crossed it out
Held all the words
Like a held-back shout
If I had one more hour
One more chance
I'd send the page
I'd risk the chance

[Chorus]
Letters never crossed
Letters never crossed
You were my almost
My almost lost
I loved you fully
But it stayed in my hands
Letters never crossed
Never crossed the end

[Verse 2]
I kept the drafts
In a drawer by the sink
Next to all the things
I could not think
Your old reply
Still lives in my phone
A little white square
That feels like home

[Pre-Chorus]
I saw your face
In the rain on glass
Every good-bye
Going too fast
If I had one more breath
One more light
I'd send that love
Into the night

[Chorus]
Letters never crossed
Letters never crossed
You were my almost
My almost lost
I loved you fully
But it stayed in my hands
Letters never crossed
Never crossed the end

[Bridge]
Now the mailbox rusts
By the same front gate
And I still hear
What I did not say
If love can live
In the things unsent
Then mine still burns
Where your name went

[Final Chorus]
Letters never crossed
Letters never crossed
You were my almost
My almost lost
I loved you fully
But it stayed in my hands
Letters never crossed
Never crossed the end
Letters never crossed
Letters never crossed
Some loves arrive
Some just suspend
I loved you fully
And that is where it stands
Letters never crossed
Never crossed the end

lyricsVariations.title: Salt Gospel
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
There is no church
but the open water
I came with my grief
like stones in my pocket

The waves took one name
then took the next one
I learned how to breathe
with my face in the salt

[Chorus]
Salt gospel, wash me clean
Salt gospel, carry me
What was lost goes under
What survives can sing
(Salt gospel)
(Salt gospel)

[Verse 2]
I buried my fear
in a coat of foam
Watched the dark turn pale
on the edge of dawn

The tide kept score
with a ruthless hand
Then it gave me back
what I could still stand

[Chorus]
Salt gospel, wash me clean
Salt gospel, carry me
What was lost goes under
What survives can sing
(Salt gospel)
(Salt gospel)

[Bridge]
If there is a prayer
it is hands in waves
If there is a heaven
it is this hard day

I was split open
I was set afloat
Now every scar
is a rope on my boat

[Final Chorus]
Salt gospel, wash me clean
Salt gospel, carry me
What was lost goes under
What survives can sing
Salt gospel, I am here
Salt gospel, I am here
(Salt gospel)
(Salt gospel)

lyricsVariations.title: Salt Gospel
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
There is no church here
Only open water
I came with a name
And left it in the brine

The wind took my shouting
The dark took my asking
What could not be saved
Became the foam line

[Chorus]
Salt gospel
Wash me clean
Salt gospel
Hold me mean

What was broken
Learns to shine
In the tide
I am alive (I am alive)

[Verse 2]
I carried your absence
Like stones in my pockets
Heavy as winter
Heavy as a vow

Then the waves kept moving
And I kept moving
No golden altar
Just this salt now

[Chorus]
Salt gospel
Wash me clean
Salt gospel
Hold me mean

What was broken
Learns to shine
In the tide
I am alive (I am alive)

[Bridge]
I do not kneel to heaven
I kneel to the deep
Where every wound is water
And every grief can sleep

If I am a temple
Then let it be weather
Let my bones remember
How to stay together

[Chorus]
Salt gospel
Wash me clean
Salt gospel
Hold me mean

What was broken
Learns to shine
In the tide
I am alive (I am alive)

selectedLyricsVersion.reason: structure: [verse, [chorus, [bridge; substantial content; singable line lengths; emotional vocabulary (5 words); chorus repetition

lyricsVariations.title: She Who Stayed Behind
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Dust motes dance in sunbeams wide
Empty rooms where laughter died
A ghost of you still walks these halls
Echoes bounce off silent walls

[Prechorus]
Footprints faded
Dreams unbraided

[Chorus]
I stayed behind
I kept the home
I carried the absence
All alone

[Verse 2]
The garden grows wild now and free
Just like the thoughts inside of me
Your favorite chair sits cold and bare
A constant ache a silent prayer

[Chorus]
I stayed behind
I kept the home
I carried the absence
All alone

[Bridge]
They say moving on is brave and bold
But staying put a story untold
A quiet strength a steady hand
To guard the memories of this land

lyricsVariations.title: The Door I Kept
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
You packed the blue bowl
Left it by the sink
Said you'd write on Sundays
Said you'd need to think

I stood in the doorway
With your coat still near
Counted every footstep
Till the street went clear

[Pre-Chorus]
I swept your side of the table
Folded up your chair
I learned how a house can breathe
With only one soul there

[Chorus]
I stayed behind
I stayed behind
I kept the flame
I kept the line

Your name in the hall
Your shoes by the wall
I stayed behind
I stayed behind

[Verse 2]
Rain came through September
Tapped on every tin
I fixed the loose window
And let the dark come in

Neighbors asked me lightly
"How long has it been?"
I said "Just till the letters
Find their way back in"

[Pre-Chorus]
But seasons don't ask permission
They just turn and turn
Every plate I washed alone
Was a little lesson learned

[Chorus]
I stayed behind
I stayed behind
I kept the flame
I kept the line

Your name in the hall
Your shoes by the wall
I stayed behind
I stayed behind

[Bridge]
You get to be a story
Moving town to town
I am the porch and the hinge
The quiet settling down

I am the key in the dish
The jam on the shelf
I am the one who made a life
Out of waiting by myself

[Final Chorus]
I stayed behind
I stayed behind
I kept the flame
I kept the line

Your name in the hall
Your shoes by the wall
I stayed behind
I stayed behind

I stayed behind
I stayed behind
And when you came back wrong
I still knew how to hold this sound

lyricsVariations.title: Blackwater Mirror
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I step onto the deck
The rope bites my palm
Salt on my sleeves
Like a second skin

The sea is dark
But it holds its face
Like it knows my name
And keeps it safe

[Pre-Chorus]
No fear in that black
Only room to breathe
A deeper kind of listening
Underneath

The night leans close
And I lean back
Like two old friends
On a steady track

[Chorus]
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight
Atlantic at night
You know my silence

Black water mirror
Show me what I hide
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight

[Verse 2]
The mast makes a sigh
When the wind turns soft
And every small light
Feels a world away

I watch the wake
Split open and heal
As if the dark
Could teach me to feel

[Pre-Chorus]
No map out here
Just a hand of stars
And the slow, brave drift
Of our wanted scars

If day is a name
Night is a song
I sing it low
And the miles roll on

[Chorus]
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight
Atlantic at night
You know my silence

Black water mirror
Show me what I hide
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight

[Bridge]
Let the shore disappear
Let the old hurt fade
I was made for this sway
For this blue parade

If I cannot say it
Let the waves say it for me
Let the dark be kind
Let the dark be free

[Final Chorus]
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight
Atlantic at night
You know my silence

Black water mirror
Show me what I hide
Atlantic at night
Hold me tonight

Atlantic at night
I am alive
Atlantic at night
I am alive

lyricsVariations.title: Atlantic Nocturne
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
The harbor slept in black silk
I met you where the water held its breath
No lantern on the rail
Just the long hush of the deck

Salt on our sleeves
And the night like a steady hand
It did not ask us anything
It only took our words and kept them

[Pre-Chorus]
And every wave said stay
Every shadow said stay
We were small, but we were safe
In the dark, the dark, the dark

[Chorus]
Atlantic nocturne
Hold me like this
Atlantic nocturne
Where the unsaid lives
The sea keeps our secrets
The sea keeps our names
Atlantic nocturne
Dream us again (dream us again)

[Verse 2]
I watched your face go silver
As a moon path split the water clean
You smiled like you knew
The things I could not mean

The old mast creaked
Like a door in a quiet house
And I let the night take over
What I could not bring out loud

[Pre-Chorus]
And every wave said stay
Every shadow said stay
We were small, but we were safe
In the dark, the dark, the dark

[Chorus]
Atlantic nocturne
Hold me like this
Atlantic nocturne
Where the unsaid lives
The sea keeps our secrets
The sea keeps our names
Atlantic nocturne
Dream us again (dream us again)

[Bridge]
If morning asks for answers
Let it find the shore alone
We can leave our doubts
In the riddle of the foam

Take the compass from my hands
Let the stars forget our trail
I would rather drift with you
Than wake and call it real

[Chorus]
Atlantic nocturne
Hold me like this
Atlantic nocturne
Where the unsaid lives
The sea keeps our secrets
The sea keeps our names
Atlantic nocturne
Dream us again (dream us again)

[Outro]
Darkness, my companion
Soft and wide and near
The ocean is a mirror
And I am clear in here

lyricsVariations.title: The Heavy Coat
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Wind bites hard on city streets
Snowflakes sting like tiny sleets
My heart it aches a frozen beat
Yeah a frozen beat

[Prechorus]
Different tongues different tears
Same old heavy fears

[Chorus]
Grief wears a heavy coat a heavy coat
No matter where you go where you go
It wraps around your throat around your throat
Never lets you know lets you know

[Verse 2]
Sun bleeds down on desert sand
A burning ache across the land
A ghost walks with an empty hand
An empty hand

[Bridge]
From mountain peak to ocean deep
The silent promises we keep
The endless reasons why we weep
Yeah why we weep

[Chorus]
Grief wears a heavy coat a heavy coat
No matter where you go where you go
It wraps around your

lyricsVariations.title: The Grief Animal
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Sunrise in Tokyo
Rain in Barcelona
A sigh in the desert wind
A tear on a frozen window pane
It’s the same old story
A heart in pieces again

[Prechorus]
Oh the weight it just hangs
A heavy cloud

[Chorus]
Grief animal
You roar you bite
Grief animal
You steal my light
Grief animal
You make me small
Grief animal
You take it all

[Verse 2]
A whispered prayer in the humid night
A shout across the endless plains
A quiet hum a burning ache
A silent scream a pouring rain
The language changes
The feeling stays the same

[Bridge]
From mountain high to ocean deep
This hollow echo where you sleep
A shadow dancing in my head
Words unspoken left unsaid
It’s a universal

lyricsVariations.title: The Port We Cannot Find
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I packed my name in a paper bag
Boarded up dreams in a train car sack
Every town gave me half a sign
Then the rain washed out the line

I asked the dock men, I asked the shore
They pointed east, they pointed more
But every map I held so tight
Turned to smoke in the morning light

[Pre-Chorus]
Still I walk on
Still I go
With a bent old map
And a torn coat

[Chorus]
The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Maybe I was home
In the searching all the time

The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Every road I kept
Brought me here alive

[Verse 2]
I slept by fields with the fence line bent
Counted each loss like a week well spent
A woman laughed with a mouth full of corn
Said, "You been leaving since you were born"

I kept her words in my jacket seam
Like a matchbook cut from a better dream
And every mile that I thought was wrong
Turned my ache into a song

[Pre-Chorus]
Still I walk on
Still I go
With a bent old map
And a torn coat

[Chorus]
The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Maybe I was home
In the searching all the time

The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Every road I kept
Brought me here alive

[Bridge]
If I never see that line on the sea
If the gate stays shut for me
I will set my boots down slow
Where the river learns to go

And I’ll call it mine
I’ll call it mine
Not a place I lost
A place I chose in time

[Chorus]
The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Maybe I was home
In the searching all the time

The port we cannot find
The port we cannot find
Every road I kept
Brought me here alive

lyricsVariations.title: The Port We Cannot Find
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Sunrise paints the highway gold
Another map unfolded
Got a hunger in my soul
A story to be told

[Chorus]
Oh the port we cannot find
Is the journey of our kind
Always moving always free
Searching you and searching me

[Verse 2]
Dusty boots and tired eyes
Beneath these endless skies
Every town a whispered name
Fueling up this burning flame

[Chorus]
Oh the port we cannot find
Is the journey of our kind
Always moving always free
Searching you and searching me

[Bridge]
Maybe home is just a word
A feeling rarely heard
Or maybe home is everywhere
In the wind in the air

[Chorus]
Oh the port we cannot find
Is the journey of our kind
Always moving always free
Searching you and searching

lyricsVariations.title: Salt on the Apron
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Your cup still on the shelf
A ring mark in the glaze
The bread knife in the drawer
Still knows your careless ways
I fold the day back up
Like linen from the line
And every crease says clearly
You were here, and you were mine

[Pre-Chorus]
I touch the chair you left
It leans like it remembers
The quiet in the house
Is loud with old embers

[Chorus]
It is love
It is loss
It is both in one hand
It is the face in the dark
It is the name in the sand
I keep you
I let you go
That is all I can do
What fado holds
What fado holds
Is me still holding you

[Verse 2]
The neighbor’s radio
Carries a summer tune
I see us at the window
In the iron afternoon
You laughed with half a peach
And I with chipped blue plate
The world was small and shining
And I was not too late

[Pre-Chorus]
Now I know the blessing
That broke before I knew it
A blessed thing can vanish
And still you walk right through it

[Chorus]
It is love
It is loss
It is both in one hand
It is the face in the dark
It is the name in the sand
I keep you
I let you go
That is all I can do
What fado holds
What fado holds
Is me still holding you

[Bridge]
Let time be rough with me
Let the years take their due
I will not curse the waking
That once belonged to you
I will wear the tear
Like a medal on my sleeve
For nothing real is nothing
And I have learned to grieve

[Final Chorus]
It is love
It is loss
It is both in one hand
It is the face in the dark
It is the name in the sand
I keep you
I let you go
That is all I can do
What fado holds
What fado holds
Is me still holding you

lyricsVariations.title: What Fado Holds
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Streetlights bleedin' gold on wet stone
Echoes of a laugh I once owned
Footsteps fading soft and slow
Where did all that good love go

[Chorus]
Fado holds a tear a smile
Every broken dream a while
Fado holds the ghost of you
Always old always new

[Verse 2]
Cobblestone paths remember our dance
A fleeting touch a stolen glance
Wind whispers secrets through the night
Chasing shadows of pure delight

[Chorus]
Fado holds a tear a smile
Every broken dream a while
Fado holds the ghost of you
Always old always new

[Bridge]
No easy answers in this song
Just feelings tangled right and wrong
A bittersweet melody
For what was meant to be

[Chorus]
Fado holds a tear a smile
Every broken dream a while
Fado holds the ghost of you

lyricsVariations.title: Salt in the Sternum
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Saudade sits down first
In the hollow of my chest
Like a stone in wet cloth
Like a coin I cannot spend

It leaves a print on my skin
Where your hand used to rest
A thin and living pressure
Under every quiet step

[Pre-Chorus]
I wash my wrists
It stays
I breathe in deep
It names me

[Chorus]
Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
It bends my ribs at dusk
And makes the room feel late

Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
A hand against my heart
That never slips away

[Verse 2]
In the mirror, my face
Looks softly overfilled
As if your missing shadow
Has taken up its fill

I feel it in the sheets
In the seam of folded clothes
In the pocket of my coat
Where your last small silence froze

[Pre-Chorus]
I turn away
It turns
I call your name
It learns

[Chorus]
Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
It bends my ribs at dusk
And makes the room feel late

Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
A hand against my heart
That never slips away

[Bridge]
If I could set it down
I would hear the table groan
I would mark the dent it made
And know what I have known

But it lives in tender places
Where the body keeps its proofs
In the pulse beneath the throat
In the skin between the roots

[Final Chorus]
Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
It bends my ribs at dusk
And makes the room feel late

Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
A hand against my heart
That never slips away

Saudade has a weight
Saudade has a weight
I carry what you left
And it carries me today

lyricsVariations.title: Saudade na Pele
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Saudade entra sem bater
senta no osso do peito
tem o peso de um copo cheio
que eu seguro sem jeito

Ela risca a pele por dentro
com dedos frios, exatos
deixa sal no canto da boca
e um vazio nos braços

[Pre-Chorus]
Eu mudo de lugar
mas ela vem comigo
no passo, no ar
no meu abrigo

[Chorus]
Saudade pesa
pesa em mim
saudade pesa
não sai daqui
no peito, inteira
meu chão, meu fim
saudade pesa
pesa em mim

[Verse 2]
Tem textura de lençol dobrado
de tarde fechada em vidro
tem a cor de fruta esquecida
na pia do meu destino

Quando você some do quarto
fica um relevo no escuro
como se a casa soubesse
onde dói mais no meu corpo

[Pre-Chorus]
Eu mudo de lugar
mas ela vem comigo
no passo, no ar
no meu abrigo

[Chorus]
Saudade pesa
pesa em mim
saudade pesa
não sai daqui
no peito, inteira
meu chão, meu fim
saudade pesa
pesa em mim

[Bridge]
Se eu toco o peito, ela responde
como pedra sob a pele
se eu fecho os olhos, você volta
mas volta e não me leve

Eu sei teu nome no meu sangue
sei teu silêncio no meu sono
e essa ausência tem contorno
tem medida, tem dono

[Final Chorus]
Saudade pesa
pesa em mim
saudade pesa
não sai daqui
no peito, inteira
meu chão, meu fim
saudade pesa
pesa em mim
saudade pesa
pesa em mim

lyricsVariations.title: All the Water
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Your name fits in my hand
Like a coin I keep warm
Across the map, across the dark
You still hold your form

Midnight here, morning there
Still I feel the same pull
Like the tide keeps its promise
Even when the moon is full

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need your shoulder
To know your weight
I don't need your footsteps
To know you stay

[Chorus]
All the water between
Can’t wash you out
All the water between
Still says your name out loud
You are here, you are real
In the shape you leave behind
All the water between
Still keeps us tied

[Verse 2]
There’s a cup by the sink
Still set for two
Some days that little detail
Is the best thing I can do

I read your old messages
Like prayer lines in a row
Not to bring you closer
Just to let the truth show

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need the room to turn
For you to be
I don't need my eyes to lie
You live in me

[Chorus]
All the water between
Can’t wash you out
All the water between
Still says your name out loud
You are here, you are real
In the shape you leave behind
All the water between
Still keeps us tied

[Bridge]
If the world draws lines
I draw them back
With every memory
And every track

Time zone to time zone
We do not fade
Love is a real thing
Even when delayed

[Chorus]
All the water between
Can’t wash you out
All the water between
Still says your name out loud
You are here, you are real
In the shape you leave behind
All the water between
Still keeps us tied

[Outro]
Not missing
Not gone
Just far
And still mine

lyricsVariations.title: All the Water Between
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Your cup stays on my shelf
The blue one with the chip
I see it every morning
Like you just took a sip

Nine hours ahead of me
Your day is still my night
I send you little fragments
You hold them up to light

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't need your hand
To know it's still your hand
A shape I could not name
Now I know where it lands

[Chorus]
All the water between us
Still can't wash you away
All the water between us
Keeps your name in the clay
You are here in the missing
You are real when you're gone
All the water between us
And I'm still holding on

[Verse 2]
Your laugh lives in my phone
In that clipped-up message tone
I play it when the room goes
Too quiet for my bones

The map keeps stretching farther
The clocks keep turning too
But distance is a border
Not a thing between me and you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't need your face
To know it by its flame
A specific kind of ache
A specific kind of name

[Chorus]
All the water between us
Still can't wash you away
All the water between us
Keeps your name in the clay
You are here in the missing
You are real when you're gone
All the water between us
And I'm still holding on

[Bridge]
Maybe love is this
A lantern in a jar
Carried through the harbor
Carried through the dark

Not a hand to touch
But a fact I can repeat
You're a living distance
Right here inside of me

[Final Chorus]
All the water between us
Still can't wash you away
All the water between us
Keeps your name in the clay
You are here in the missing
You are real when you're gone
All the water between us
And I'm still holding on

lyricsVariations.title: Sea Keeps Our Names
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
The dock was wet with rain
and salt on every sleeve
Marta held a paper bag
like it could help her breathe

My brother kissed the rail
then stared into the dark
We learned the names we carried
before we learned the sparks

[Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
It takes what we bring
and still remembers

The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
The brave, the lost, the changed
all the same to the waves

[Verse 2]
Some came with shoes in hand
some came with empty eyes
Some reached the other shore
and left their old lives behind

I saw a child wake up
with sand in her curled hair
She looked like two whole lives
were tangled in the air

[Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
It takes what we bring
and still remembers

The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
The brave, the lost, the changed
all the same to the waves

[Bridge]
For every face that vanished
for every voice that rose
For every soul that made it
scarred by what it knows

If you call out over water
it answers in its own way
Not with hands, not with mercy
but with what it can save

[Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
It takes what we bring
and still remembers

The sea keeps our names
the sea keeps our names
The brave, the lost, the changed
all the same to the waves

lyricsVariations.title: Salt On The Ledger
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
The dock wrote down your face
In rain and engine smoke
You left with seven others
A coat, a list, a hope

The waves took off your accent
Left sand in every seam
You came back with new weather
And eyes that’d seen the seam

[Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
On a cold black page
Where the water won’t fade

The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
For the ones who crossed
And the ones who remained

[Verse 2]
There’s one for every morning
A cup left in the sink
One for the missing hammock
One for the ship that sank

One for the child who landed
With salt in her hair
One for the mother waiting
Still folding air

[Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
On a cold black page
Where the water won’t fade

The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
For the ones who crossed
And the ones who remained

[Bridge]
Say mine
Say yours
Say the ones we lost at dawn

If the tide can take a body
It can’t take what we were called

[Final Chorus]
The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
On a cold black page
Where the water won’t fade

The sea keeps our names
The sea keeps our names
For the ones who crossed
And the ones who remained

lyricsVariations.title: The Open Road
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Sunrise in my rearview mirror
Another town another sign
Dusty boots and a heart so clear
Leaving worries behind

[Pre-Chorus]
Yeah the road it calls my name
A whisper in the wind

[Chorus]
I chose the open
The open road
I chose the open
A heavy load
I chose the open
A brand new day
I chose the open
Come what may

[Verse 2]
Some folks they chase the easy dream
A soft bed a warm embrace
Me I like the engine's scream
A smile upon my face

[Pre-Chorus]
Yeah the highway is my friend
Until the very end

[Chorus]
I chose the open
The open road
I chose the open
A heavy load
I chose the open
A brand new day
I chose the open
Come what may

lyricsVariations.title: I Chose the Open
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
The room was black
The floor held still
I heard my name
Like a warning bell
I had the door
I had the key
But fear said stay
And look at me

[Pre-Chorus]
I tasted dust
I felt the bend
One more step
Or break at the end
Not for hope
Not for a sign
Just because
I was still alive

[Chorus]
I chose the open
I chose the open
When the dark got loud
I stayed in motion
I chose the open
I chose the open
Not for tomorrow
Just for devotion

[Verse 2]
The night bit hard
It took its share
Cold in my lungs
Sharp in the air
I saw what stops
What stays, what dies
Then I kept going
With shaking eyes

[Pre-Chorus]
I had the weight
I had the fear
I heard the truth
Too plain, too clear
If I go back
I lose my ground
So I moved on
Without a sound

[Chorus]
I chose the open
I chose the open
When the dark got loud
I stayed in motion
I chose the open
I chose the open
Not for tomorrow
Just for devotion

[Bridge]
Not because
The sky was kind
Not because
I knew I'd find
Some easy road
Some healed-up part
I moved because
It broke my heart

[Final Chorus]
I chose the open
I chose the open
When the dark got loud
I stayed in motion
I chose the open
I chose the open
Not for tomorrow
Just for devotion
I chose the open
I chose the open
And every hard step
Kept me whole again

lyricsVariations.title: Still We Sail
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
We left with salt on sleeves,
and names we would not say.
The shore kept shrinking back
like it knew the price of stay.
I packed your photograph
inside my coat of rain.

[Pre-Chorus]
And all the miles
did not erase
the hands we lost,
the rooms we praised.

[Chorus]
Still we sail
through the ache
Still we sail
with a broken wake
Love stays
in the skin
Still we sail
to the light within

[Verse 2]
The border ate our hours,
the road kept asking why.
We learned to walk with ghosts
and keep the lantern dry.
Your laughter in the dark
was bread I could not buy.

[Pre-Chorus]
So let the wind
keep every scar
we are not whole,
but here we are.

[Chorus]
Still we sail
through the ache
Still we sail
with a broken wake
Love stays
in the skin
Still we sail
to the light within

[Bridge]
Not victory.
Not a crown.
Just two tired hearts
not putting down.
Saudade in the ribs,
salt in the blood,
we carry what was gone
and call it love.

[Chorus]
Still we sail
through the ache
Still we sail
with a broken wake
Love stays
in the skin
Still we sail
to the light within

lyricsVariations.title: Still We Sail
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
We came with the salt
Still on our sleeves
Names in our mouths
Like small hard seeds
We crossed the dark
With your hand in mine
Carrying what broke
And what would not die

[Pre-Chorus]
Not for a crown
Not for applause
Just to keep
What the storm left yours
Just to keep
The ember near
Just to keep
The love right here

[Chorus]
Still we sail
Still we sail
Past the ache
Past the veil
Still we sail
Still we sail
To light
To light

[Verse 2]
I learned your grief
Had a shape and sound
A chair by the door
A coat on the ground
Exile in the blood
Saudade in the bone
A thousand miles
And still we call it home

[Pre-Chorus]
Not all lost
Is gone for good
Some things live
As they always would
In the bread we break
In the names we save
In the quiet way
We refuse the grave

[Chorus]
Still we sail
Still we sail
Past the ache
Past the veil
Still we sail
Still we sail
To light
To light

[Bridge]
And if there’s no bright gate
No horns, no gold
No final shore
That says we're whole
Then let the small flame
Be enough for me
Your hand in my hand
At the edge of the sea

[Final Chorus]
Still we sail
Still we sail
Past the ache
Past the veil
Still we sail
Still we sail
To light
To light

Still we sail
Still we sail
We are here
We are home
